Figure 11: Real-world execution of the task “Fold the towel.” Our OFlow completes all stages successfully, while the baseline policy 𝜋0 misaligns with the towel during grasping and ultimately fails.

Figure 10: Real-world execution of the task “pick up a large cabbage and place it into a microwave.” Our OFlow completes all stages successfully, while the baseline policy 𝜋0 misaligns with the object during grasping and ultimately fails.
